# netbox_regions (Data Source)

Fetches a list of regions from Netbox.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Placeholder identifier for the data source.
- `regions` (Attributes List) List of regions. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--regions))

<a id="nestedatt--regions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `regions`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) Description for the region.
- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the region.
- `name` (String) Name of the region.
- `parent_id` (Number) The numeric ID of the parent region.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly unique shorthand for the region.
